title: gossia katepahiensis
intro: Gossia katepahiensis, also known as the Katepahii tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae native to New Caledonia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Gossia katepahiensis has been used for its health benefits, which include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are used in herbal preparations to make teas and extracts.
